title: Lead Instructional Designer at Ratna Sagar

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Ratna Sagar
jsonLd.description:
Join the Ratna Sagar family as a Instructional Designer in Madurai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Ratna Sagar:
Ratna Sagar is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ratna Sagar!
